requirement_topic.en: CE Marking + TSE Mark — Conformity Assessment for Turkey (Safety + EMC + Energy)
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志 + TSE标志——土耳其合格评定（安全 + 电磁兼容 + 能效）
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌 + TSE標誌——土耳其合格評定（安全 + 電磁相容 + 能效）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Turkish market must bear the CE marking, which Turkey adopts through the EU-Turkey Customs Union, demonstrating conformity with all applicable Turkish technical regulations. For a standard household refrigerator, this means conformity with at minimum: (1) the Turkish Low Voltage technical regulation (transposing Directive 2014/35/EU) — electrical safety, tested to TS EN 60335-2-24; (2) the Turkish EMC technical regulation (transposing Directive 2014/30/EU) — electromagnetic compatibility, tested to TS EN 55014-1; (3) the Turkish ecodesign / energy-performance regulation — energy requirements. If the appliance includes wireless connectivity, the Turkish radio-equipment regulation (transposing Directive 2014/53/EU) also applies. In addition to CE, the TSE mark issued by the Turkish Standards Institution (TSE) against TS EN standards is a widely recognised national conformity mark and may be required or commercially expected for certain product categories or public procurement. The CE marking is affixed by the manufacturer or the Turkey-established importer after completing the conformity assessment procedure (typically self-declaration for LVD/EMC; energy compliance declared in the DoC and technical documentation).
summary.zh: 投放土耳其市场的家用制冷器具须加贴CE标志（土耳其经欧土关税同盟采纳），以证明符合所有适用的土耳其技术法规。对于标准家用电冰箱，至少须符合：（1）土耳其低压技术法规（转化指令2014/35/EU）——电气安全，按TS EN 60335-2-24检测；（2）土耳其电磁兼容技术法规（转化指令2014/30/EU）——电磁兼容性，按TS EN 55014-1检测；（3）土耳其生态设计/能效法规——能效要求。若器具包含无线连接功能，土耳其无线设备法规（转化指令2014/53/EU）亦须遵守。除CE外，土耳其标准协会（TSE）依据TS EN标准颁发的TSE标志是广泛认可的国家合格标志，某些产品类别或公共采购可能要求或在商业上预期使用。CE标志由制造商或在土耳其设立的进口商在完成合格评定程序后加贴（LVD/EMC通常采用自我声明；能效合规在符合性声明及技术文件中声明）。
summary.zht: 投放土耳其市場的家用製冷器具須加貼CE標誌（土耳其經歐土關稅同盟採納），以證明符合所有適用的土耳其技術法規。對於標準家用電冰箱，至少須符合：（1）土耳其低壓技術法規（轉化指令2014/35/EU）——電氣安全，按TS EN 60335-2-24檢測；（2）土耳其電磁相容技術法規（轉化指令2014/30/EU）——電磁相容性，按TS EN 55014-1檢測；（3）土耳其生態設計/能效法規——能效要求。若器具包含無線連接功能，土耳其無線設備法規（轉化指令2014/53/EU）亦須遵守。除CE外，土耳其標準協會（TSE）依據TS EN標準頒發的TSE標誌是廣泛認可的國家合格標誌，某些產品類別或公共採購可能要求或在商業上預期使用。CE標誌由製造商或在土耳其設立的進口商在完成合格評定程序後加貼（LVD/EMC通常採用自我聲明；能效合規在符合性聲明及技術文件中聲明）。

standards_or_laws: Turkey Low Voltage technical regulation (transposing Directive 2014/35/EU under the EU-Turkey Customs Union) — electrical safety
Turkey EMC technical regulation (transposing Directive 2014/30/EU) — electromagnetic compatibility
Turkey ecodesign / energy-performance regulation for household refrigerating appliances (EU-aligned)
Turkey radio-equipment regulation (transposing Directive 2014/53/EU) — if wireless connectivity present
TSE mark — Turkish Standards Institution conformity mark against TS EN standards
EU-Turkey Customs Union (Decision 1/95) — basis for adoption of CE marking and free movement of industrial goods

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs); it does not involve manufacturer self-declaration. Energy labelling (China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2) is a separate mandatory requirement administered by NDRC/SAMR. There is no single CE-equivalent mark in China: CCC covers safety/EMC, the China Energy Label covers energy, and these are separately issued and displayed.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）两项内容。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核；制造商无需进行自我声明。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的独立强制性要求。中国没有单一等同于CE的标识：CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，两者分别颁发和展示。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）兩項內容。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核；製造商無需進行自我聲明。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的獨立強制性要求。中國沒有單一等同於CE的標識：CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，兩者分別頒發和展示。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete Turkey conformity package from scratch — CCC and China Energy Label do not substitute for any Turkish requirement: (1) EU/CE Declaration of Conformity (DoC) — a manufacturer-signed legal document listing all applicable Turkish technical regulations and harmonised TS EN standards applied; must be retained (typically 10 years); (2) Technical File — test reports to TS EN 60335-2-24 / TS EN 55014-1 / TS EN 62552, risk assessment, design drawings, circuit diagrams, BOM with materials; (3) CE marking — physical affixing on product; (4) Turkish energy-efficiency declaration; (5) Turkish energy label — A-to-G label (Turkish language) for point-of-sale and online listings; (6) TSE mark where required or commercially expected; (7) Turkey-established importer (see row frigtr2-market-002). The CE DoC is a manufacturer self-declaration; test reports are typically generated by accredited laboratories recognised under the Turkish/EU framework. Conformity must reflect Turkey's 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须从头建立完整的土耳其合规文件包——CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代任何土耳其要求：（1）EU/CE符合性声明（DoC）——制造商签署的法律文件，列明所有适用的土耳其技术法规及所采用的协调TS EN标准；须保存（通常10年）；（2）技术文件——依据TS EN 60335-2-24 / TS EN 55014-1 / TS EN 62552出具的检测报告、风险评估、设计图纸、电路图、含材料信息的物料清单；（3）CE标志——在产品上实物加贴；（4）土耳其能效声明；（5）土耳其能效标签——销售点及在线商品列表中的A至G标签（土耳其语）；（6）在要求或商业预期时取得TSE标志；（7）在土耳其设立的进口商（详见frigtr2-market-002行）。CE符合性声明为制造商自我声明；检测报告通常由土耳其/欧盟框架下认可的实验室出具。合规须反映土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供电。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須從頭建立完整的土耳其合規文件包——CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代任何土耳其要求：（1）EU/CE符合性聲明（DoC）——製造商簽署的法律文件，列明所有適用的土耳其技術法規及所採用的協調TS EN標準；須保存（通常10年）；（2）技術文件——依據TS EN 60335-2-24 / TS EN 55014-1 / TS EN 62552出具的檢測報告、風險評估、設計圖紙、電路圖、含材料資訊的物料清單；（3）CE標誌——在產品上實物加貼；（4）土耳其能效聲明；（5）土耳其能效標籤——銷售點及線上商品列表中的A至G標籤（土耳其語）；（6）在要求或商業預期時取得TSE標誌；（7）在土耳其設立的進口商（詳見frigtr2-market-002行）。CE符合性聲明為製造商自我聲明；檢測報告通常由土耳其/歐盟框架下認可的實驗室出具。合規須反映土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供電。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking required before placement on the Turkish market (via the EU-Turkey Customs Union); Turkish energy-efficiency declaration and energy label display are also mandatory hard gates; TSE mark required or commercially expected for certain categories / public procurement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: Turkish Standards Institution (Türk Standardları Enstitüsü, TSE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking (covering the Turkish LVD, EMC, and energy regulations) is mandatory for market access in Turkey, adopted via the EU-Turkey Customs Union. The TSE mark may also be required or commercially expected. Chinese CCC and China Energy Label are entirely separate systems — neither substitutes for CE marking, the DoC, the Turkish energy declaration, or the Turkish energy label. Manufacturers must build all Turkish compliance documentation independently.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CE标志（涵盖土耳其低压、电磁兼容及能效法规）是进入土耳其市场的强制要求，经欧土关税同盟采纳。TSE标志亦可能被要求或在商业上预期。中国CCC和中国能效标识是完全独立的制度——均不能替代CE标志、符合性声明、土耳其能效声明或土耳其能效标签。制造商须独立建立所有土耳其合规文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CE標誌（涵蓋土耳其低壓、電磁相容及能效法規）是進入土耳其市場的強制要求，經歐土關稅同盟採納。TSE標誌亦可能被要求或在商業上預期。中國CCC和中國能效標識是完全獨立的制度——均不能替代CE標誌、符合性聲明、土耳其能效聲明或土耳其能效標籤。製造商須獨立建立所有土耳其合規文件。

requirement_topic.en: Turkey-Established Importer + Market Surveillance + Import Clearance (Mersin / Istanbul)
requirement_topic.zh: 在土耳其设立的进口商 + 市场监管 + 进口清关（梅尔辛/伊斯坦布尔）
requirement_topic.zht: 在土耳其設立的進口商 + 市場監管 + 進口清關（梅爾辛/伊斯坦布爾）

summary.en: Turkey's product-safety and market-surveillance framework (the Product Safety and Technical Regulations Law No. 7223 and related implementing regulations, administered by the Ministry of Trade) requires that products placed on the Turkish market have an identifiable economic operator established in Turkey. For household refrigerating appliances manufactured outside Turkey (including China), the Turkey-established importer fulfils this role and is responsible for product compliance. The importer must: hold or have access to the CE Declaration of Conformity and Technical File; be identifiable on the product label, packaging, or in the instructions (name and address in Turkey); cooperate with Ministry of Trade market surveillance authorities; ensure Turkish-language user instructions and the Turkish energy label; and take corrective action (including recall) if a product is found non-compliant. At import, goods undergo customs clearance and TAREKS (risk-based import inspection) controls; refrigerators typically enter through the ports of Mersin or Istanbul. The importer role cannot be satisfied by a freight forwarder, customs broker, or test laboratory alone.
summary.zh: 土耳其产品安全与市场监管框架（第7223号《产品安全与技术法规法》及相关实施条例，由贸易部管理）要求投放土耳其市场的产品须有一个在土耳其境内设立的可识别经济运营商。对于土耳其境外（包括中国）制造的家用制冷器具，由在土耳其设立的进口商履行此职责并对产品合规负责。进口商须：持有或能够访问CE符合性声明和技术文件；在产品标签、包装或说明书中可识别（土耳其境内的名称和地址）；配合贸易部市场监管机构；确保提供土耳其语使用说明书及土耳其能效标签；并在产品被认定不合规时采取纠正措施（包括召回）。进口时，货物须经海关清关及TAREKS（基于风险的进口检验）管控；电冰箱通常经梅尔辛（Mersin）或伊斯坦布尔（Istanbul）港口入境。进口商角色不能仅由货运代理、报关行或检测机构承担。
summary.zht: 土耳其產品安全與市場監管框架（第7223號《產品安全與技術法規法》及相關實施條例，由貿易部管理）要求投放土耳其市場的產品須有一個在土耳其境內設立的可識別經濟運營商。對於土耳其境外（包括中國）製造的家用製冷器具，由在土耳其設立的進口商履行此職責並對產品合規負責。進口商須：持有或能夠訪問CE符合性聲明和技術文件；在產品標籤、包裝或說明書中可識別（土耳其境內的名稱和地址）；配合貿易部市場監管機構；確保提供土耳其語使用說明書及土耳其能效標籤；並在產品被認定不合規時採取糾正措施（包括召回）。進口時，貨物須經海關清關及TAREKS（基於風險的進口檢驗）管控；電冰箱通常經梅爾辛（Mersin）或伊斯坦布爾（Istanbul）港口入境。進口商角色不能僅由貨運代理、報關行或檢測機構承擔。

standards_or_laws: Product Safety and Technical Regulations Law No. 7223 — responsible economic operator / importer obligations (administered by the Ministry of Trade)
Turkey market surveillance implementing regulations — obligations of importers and distributors
TAREKS — risk-based import inspection system (Ministry of Trade) for controlled products at import
Import customs clearance — ports of Mersin and Istanbul (typical entry points for household appliances)

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring manufacturers of export-bound products to designate a foreign-country resident legal representative responsible for product compliance and market surveillance cooperation. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis, without a statutory Turkey-style established-importer obligation. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for domestic market compliance — this role and obligation does not extend to or satisfy Turkish market surveillance requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口产品制造商指定一名在目的国境内设立、负责产品合规及配合市场监管的法定代表。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但不存在法定的类土耳其设立进口商义务。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色和义务不延伸至土耳其市场监管要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口產品製造商指定一名在目的國境內設立、負責產品合規及配合市場監管的法定代表。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但不存在法定的類土耳其設立進口商義務。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色和義務不延伸至土耳其市場監管要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the Turkey-established importer obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. Chinese refrigerator manufacturers selling into the Turkish market must work through a Turkey-established importer who assumes responsible-operator obligations; the importer's name and address must appear on the product label or accompanying documentation, and Turkish-language instructions plus the Turkish energy label must be provided. At the border, controlled products are subject to TAREKS import inspection and customs clearance, predominantly at the ports of Mersin or Istanbul. Without a Turkey-established importer, the product cannot legally be placed on the Turkish market regardless of CE marking status. Note also that the appliance must be configured for Turkey's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China; voltage differs from China's 220/380 V).
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。向土耳其市场销售产品的中国电冰箱制造商须通过在土耳其设立的进口商运作，由其承担责任运营商义务；进口商的名称和地址须出现在产品标签或随附文件上，并须提供土耳其语说明书及土耳其能效标签。在边境，受控产品须经TAREKS进口检验及海关清关，主要在梅尔辛（Mersin）或伊斯坦布尔（Istanbul）港口办理。在无土耳其设立进口商的情况下，无论CE标志状态如何，产品均不得合法投放土耳其市场。另须注意，器具须按土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz电网配置（50 Hz与中国相同；电压不同于中国的220/380 V）。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。向土耳其市場銷售產品的中國電冰箱製造商須通過在土耳其設立的進口商運作，由其承擔責任運營商義務；進口商的名稱和地址須出現在產品標籤或隨附文件上，並須提供土耳其語說明書及土耳其能效標籤。在邊境，受控產品須經TAREKS進口檢驗及海關清關，主要在梅爾辛（Mersin）或伊斯坦布爾（Istanbul）港口辦理。在無土耳其設立進口商的情況下，無論CE標誌狀態如何，產品均不得合法投放土耳其市場。另須注意，器具須按土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz電網配置（50 Hz與中國相同；電壓不同於中國的220/380 V）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Turkey-established importer (responsible economic operator) is required before any unit is placed on the Turkish market under Law No. 7223; TAREKS import inspection and customs clearance (Mersin / Istanbul) apply at import
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a Turkey-established importer under Chinese law

source.publisher: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Trade (Ticaret Bakanlığı)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers must work through a Turkey-established importer (responsible economic operator) before the first unit is placed on the Turkish market. This is a hard legal gate under Law No. 7223 — failure to comply, or failure to clear TAREKS / customs at Mersin or Istanbul, exposes the goods to market withdrawal and import refusal by the Ministry of Trade.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱制造商须在首批产品投放土耳其市场前通过在土耳其设立的进口商（责任经济运营商）运作。这是第7223号法律下的强制性法律门槛——不合规，或未能在梅尔辛或伊斯坦布尔通过TAREKS/海关清关，将使货物面临贸易部的市场撤回及进口拒绝。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱製造商須在首批產品投放土耳其市場前通過在土耳其設立的進口商（責任經濟運營商）運作。這是第7223號法律下的強制性法律門檻——不合規，或未能在梅爾辛或伊斯坦布爾通過TAREKS/海關清關，將使貨物面臨貿易部的市場撤回及進口拒絕。
